summary: Iteration 29 - Multi-tenant Restaurant Management System Testing. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Owner login, Super Admin panel with tenant management, invoice settings, customer login, tables page (5 tables), POS page with categories.

issues: Categories show placeholder box icons instead of actual images - this is because the customer tenant (ahmed@albait.com) has categories without images set. The default tenant has images but customer tenants need to upload their own.
No products displayed for customer tenant - this is expected as the customer tenant has no products created yet. Products need to be added by the tenant admin.

passed_tests: GET /api/super-admin/stats - Returns stats excluding default tenant sales
GET /api/tables - Returns 5 tables for customer tenant
GET /api/categories - Returns 5 categories for customer tenant
GET /api/products - Returns empty list (no products for this tenant)
GET /api/system/invoice-settings - Returns system invoice settings with system_name
PUT /api/system/invoice-settings - Updates system invoice settings (owner only)

super_admin_stats.notes: Stats correctly exclude default tenant (main system) sales. Shows: total_tenants=3, active_tenants=3, total_orders (excluding default), total_sales (excluding default)

features: View all tenants with stats (users, branches, orders)

tables_management.notes: Customer tenant has 5 tables in القاعة الرئيسية (Main Hall). Stats show: 5 متاحة (available), 0 مشغولة (occupied), 0 محجوزة (reserved)

features: 5 categories displayed (برغر, بيتزا, مشروبات, حلويات, سلطات)
pos_page.notes: Products not displayed because customer tenant has no products created yet

critical_code_review_comments: Super admin stats correctly excludes default tenant (tenant_id != 'default') for orders and sales calculations (server.py lines 7467-7486)
Tenant reactivate endpoint working correctly (PUT /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/reactivate) - server.py lines 7408-7419
System invoice settings includes system_name field (server.py line 6177)
Tables are correctly created per tenant with 5 tables for each customer
Categories and products have image field support but customer tenants need to upload their own images
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_29.py - Created comprehensive test suite for iteration 29 features

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly, all features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 completed successfully. All requested features verified: 1) Owner login and Super Admin panel working, 2) Super admin stats correctly exclude default tenant sales, 3) Tenant activate/deactivate working via DELETE and PUT /reactivate endpoints, 4) Customer has 5 tables in Tables management page, 5) POS page shows 5 categories but no products (customer tenant has no products yet), 6) System invoice settings include system_name field and are editable by owner, 7) Invoice settings show system info. Note: Customer tenant (ahmed@albait.com) has categories but no products - this is expected as products need to be created by the tenant admin.
